title: Renting Out of HDB Flats
text:
Renting Out of HDB Flats - SupportGoWhere
Renting Out of HDB Flats
Share link
Enables eligible Singapore Citizen flat owners to rent out their HDB flat after meeting the Minimum Occupation Period.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Only Singapore Citizens can rent out HDB flats
Fulfill Minimum Occupation Period (MOP) before renting out (Prime and Plus flats cannot be rented out)
Non-Citizen Quota applies for non-Malaysian tenants
Approval from HDB required before renting out
Collapse all sections
About this support

Receive rental income through renting out your flat where necessary  

Provide an option to seniors to monetise your flat and move to live with family members 

Who is this for?

Owner must be a Singapore Citizen to rent out the HDB flat. Singapore Permanent Residents are not allowed to do so.

Fulfill a Minimum Occupation Period (MOP) of 5 years, or 3 years for non-subsidised flats purchased before 30 August 2010. Non-subsidised flats refer to those purchased from the open market without a housing grant. Owners of Prime and Plus flats are not allowed to rent out the flat even after the 10-year MOP. Owners of 2-room Flexi flats, Studio Apartments and Lease Buyback Scheme (LBS) flats are also not eligible to rent out their flat.

MOP is calculated from the date of purchase or the effective date of transfer of flat ownership.

Do consider the Non-Citizen Quota, if owners are renting to tenants who are non-Malaysian non-citizens (Singapore Permanent Residents or foreigners). Use HDB’s e-Service to check if your flat can be rented out to non-Malaysian non-citizens.

How to apply?

Flat owners must ensure that they comply with the regulations listed on HDB’s website before renting out their flats. These include the number of tenants and their legal residency status.

'Apply/ Manage Application to Rent Out Flat' e-Service or MyHDB mobile app. An administrative fee of $18 applies for each application. 

Notify HDB of any changes in rental details (e.g. changes to your tenants’ particulars or if your tenants move out of the flat) within 7 days, and obtain approval for new tenants before they move in.

Where can I find help?

View more details

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
